mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_follow (follower_id, following_id, create_time) VALUES (#{followerId}, #{followingId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_follow WHERE follower_id = #{followerId} AND following_id = #{followingId}
mapper.select: SELECT following_id FROM user_follow WHERE follower_id = #{followerId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_follow WHERE following_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_follow WHERE follower_id = #{userId}
